llm.summary: The task is complete in substance. The implementation adds Prisma/SQLite endpoint persistence with migrations, repo-local database configuration, deterministic db preparation, idempotent seed defaults, matching generated schema documentation, and repeatability unit coverage. The supplied mandatory gate results show npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify all passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare creates/updates SQLite runtime state through Prisma migrations, client generation, and seed preparation.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by a unit test that runs it twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular seed rows.
The Prisma schema represents endpoint name/title/description/enabled/default/delete/failure fields, ordered parameters, response cases, timestamps, and immutable endpoint IDs.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the inspected Prisma models, constraints, seed defaults, and db:prepare behavior.
The task maps to docs/product-specs/endpoint-tool-management.md and does not broaden into UI, runtime auth, MCP, REST, or reset behavior.
All required checks are reported passing in the deterministic check summary.

summary: The task is complete in substance. The implementation adds Prisma/SQLite endpoint persistence with migrations, repo-local database configuration, deterministic db preparation, idempotent seed defaults, matching generated schema documentation, and repeatability unit coverage. The supplied mandatory gate results show npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify all passed.
